name: Braised Octopus (Polipi in Umido)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the octopus.
2. Heat olive oil in a saucepan and sauté the onions until they become transparent.
3. Add garlic and tomatoes to the pan. Cook together for a few minutes.
4. Add pine nuts, then place the octopus into the pan. Cook over high heat for 2 or 3 more minutes.
5. Pour in white wine, cover the pan, and gently simmer until the octopus is cooked (small ones will cook in less than 10 minutes).
6. Just before cooking is completed, add basil leaves and season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve with rice.
